signals.raw:
MED confidence**—Trump's statements (April 16-18) dominate but are undercut by ongoing diplomacy, blockades, and conflicting reports; no independent resolution verified as of April 18 presser.[5]  
No market-moving confirmations on **Lebanon** ceasefire or leader talks beyond Trump's unverified posts.[1]

signals.headline: Ethereum (ETH) Hits $6K on April 18, 2026 Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Ethereum (ETH) Hits $6K on April 18, 2026 Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[2]

Ethereum's price has surged significantly, dominating the smart contract sector due to a massive surge in institutional demand and Spot Ethereum ETF inflows reaching all-time highs as of April 18, 2026[2]. The Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade has entered its final testing
